title: AN ACT RENAMING THE MINDANAO CENTRAL SANITARIUM IN PASOBOLONG, ZAMBOANGA CITY TO ZAMBOANGA REGIONAL MEDICAL CENTER

chunks.text:
Manila Bulletin, January 09, 2025 p.4

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 12117, January 03, 2025 ]

AN ACT RENAMING THE MINDANAO CENTRAL SANITARIUM IN PASOBOLONG, ZAMBOANGA CITY TO ZAMBOANGA REGIONAL MEDICAL CENTER

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Mindanao Central Sanitarium in Pasobolong, Zamboanga City is hereby renamed to Zamboanga Regional Medical Center.

SEC. 2. All laws, executive orders, issuances, and rules and regulations inconsistent with this Act are hereby repealed or modified accordingly.

SEC. 2. All laws, executive orders, issuances, and rules and regulations inconsistent with this Act are hereby repealed or modified accordingly.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect after fifteen (15) days following the completion of its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

FRANCIS "CHIZ" G. ESCUDERO

(SGD.)

FERDINAND MARTIN G. ROMUALDEZ

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act, which originated in the House of Representatives, was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate of the Philippines on December 12, 2023 ad November 4, 2024, respectively.

(SGD.)

RENATO N. BANTUG, JR.

(SGD.)

REGINALD S. VELASCO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: JAN 03 2025

(

SGD.)

FERDINAND ROMUALDEZ MARCOS JR.

President of the Philippines
